title: GovernanceSchemas
description: JSON schemas for Liquity V2 governance API responses.

GovernanceInitiative.title: GovernanceInitiative
GovernanceInitiative.description: Metadata for a Liquity V2 governance initiative.

isBribeInitiative.description: Whether this initiative uses bribe mechanisms.

bribeToken.description: Ethereum token contract address used for bribes, or null if not a bribe initiative.

InitiativesMap.title: InitiativesMap
InitiativesMap.description: Mapping of Ethereum initiative contract addresses to governance initiative metadata.

LatestCompletedEpoch.title: LatestCompletedEpoch
LatestCompletedEpoch.description: Index number of the most recently completed governance epoch. Epoch cadence is weekly starting from timestamp 1746662400.
